UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User account registration profile representing public/admin accessible data.

name.description: Full name or display name of the user.

role.description: The authorization role of the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the account was registered.

PrivatePII.title: PrivatePII
PrivatePII.description: Sensitive personal information isolated for PII Protection.

email.description: Registered email address of the user.

ProgressRecord.title: ProgressRecord
ProgressRecord.description: Daily wellness tracking and habit completion details.

date.description: The specific calendar date of this record (Format: YYYY-MM-DD).

completedHabits.description: List of completed habit identifiers or names.

badges.description: Badges earned or unlocked at and prior to this day.

currentStreak.description: Current active streak of consecutive days.

userId.description: The registered identifier for user relationship integrity.

/users/{userId}/private/sensitive.description: Subcollection isolating sensitive PII (email) from other users and administrative searches.

/users/{userId}/progress_history/{histor.description: Subcollection storing detailed historical daily habits progress.
